ConsentModal.title: Data Usage Consent
ConsentModal.description: Before you start building, please note how your survey data will be used:
ConsentModal.deidentificationText: All survey responses are automatically de-identified to protect participant privacy.
ConsentModal.marketplaceText: By default, de-identified datasets are contributed to our Open Marketplace to keep Surtopya free.
ConsentModal.paidOptoutText: Pro users can opt-out of data sharing for non-public surveys.

SurveyRenderer.previewBanner: Preview Mode - Responses are not saved

Datasets.heroDescription: Analysis-ready de-identified datasets with clear access terms, available whenever you need them.
Datasets.openDatasetNoticeText: Datasets shared here are de-identified and aggregated to protect respondent privacy.

Explore.title: Explore
Explore.description: Find a survey you're curious about, take a few minutes to complete it, and earn points as a reward.
Explore.checkBackLater: New surveys are added regularly — check back soon

Pricing.title: Clear and Predictable
Pricing.description: Pick a plan that fits your research scale. No hidden fees, no confusing rules.

About.title: About
About.missionText: Surtopya helps surveys get discovered like great content — bringing in ongoing responses and turning results into data that lasts.
About.subtitle: We turn every survey into a searchable public page that keeps working for you, long after you hit publish.
About.intro: Most surveys go quiet within days of launch — not because the topic isn't interesting, but because no one can find them. Surtopya changes that, making surveys discoverable and continuously answered, like content pages.
About.whyQualityText: Public pages and version history keep survey content traceable — no more relying on a single snapshot for analysis.
About.whyRewardsText: Most of the fee goes directly back to respondents, making every participation worthwhile.
About.whyAssetsText: Your data isn't just a one-off report. It's an asset that grows in value and can be revisited over time.

Home.heroSubtitle: Like a well-written article, your survey lives on — searchable, shareable, and continuously attracting responses.
Home.featureSectionTitle: Every survey deserves a long shelf life
Home.featureSectionDescription: Surtopya keeps surveys alive like content pages — searchable, revisable, and always open for responses.
Home.featureOneDescription: Your survey appears in search results automatically — no need to reshare repeatedly. Just publish and let it work.
Home.featureTwoDescription: Found an issue? Need to adjust? Edit without disrupting existing responses. Old data stays, new responses keep coming.
Home.featureTwoNote: Draft and published versions managed separately
Home.featureThreeDescription: Every response is stored and organized. Export for analysis anytime, or optionally share on the marketplace.
Home.gameplaySectionDescription: Build once, keep collecting, and turn every response into reusable insight assets.
Home.gameplayStepOneDescription: Create quickly, set visibility, and publish. Then let natural traffic come to you.
Home.gameplayStepOneNote: No design skills needed · Template to get started
Home.gameplayStepTwoDescription: Respondents earn points instantly when they complete a survey. Better rewards attract more participation.
Home.gameplayStepTwoNote: Automated point distribution · Participant reward system
Home.gameplayStepThreeDescription: Every response is stored safely. Over time, your dataset becomes more complete.
Home.pointsUsageDescription: Use points to improve response quality, unlock paid data, and keep the earn-and-use loop running.
Home.pointsUsageBoostDescription: When publishing a survey, allocate extra points that are paid to respondents who complete it.
Home.pointsUsageDownloadDescription: Spend points to access premium datasets from the marketplace for faster analysis.
Home.pointsUsageEarnDescription: Complete surveys to earn points, then reuse them for future research actions.
Home.roleResearchersDescription: Ship survey pages quickly, keep versions organized, and turn accumulated responses into durable data assets.
Home.roleParticipantsDescription: Find surveys that match your interests, complete them in minutes, and earn points continuously.

LegalTerms.title: Terms of Service Summary
LegalTerms.intro: This page is a readable summary of Surtopya terms and the core usage expectations.
LegalTerms.useBody: You may use Surtopya to create surveys, submit responses, and access eligible datasets. Do not upload unlawful or abusive content.
LegalTerms.contentBody: Survey creators are responsible for what they publish and should ensure compliance with local laws and platform rules.
LegalTerms.availabilityBody: We continuously improve reliability and security, but uninterrupted availability is not guaranteed at all times.
LegalTerms.contactBody: If you have questions about terms, contact us through platform channels. Updates will be announced in-product.
LegalTerms.summaryNote: Note: this is a plain-language summary and not legal advice.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy Summary
LegalPrivacy.intro: This page explains how Surtopya handles account data, survey responses, and de-identified data workflows.
LegalPrivacy.collectBody: We process basic account data, survey content, and operational logs required to provide the service securely.
LegalPrivacy.deidentifyBody: Before data enters the marketplace, responses are de-identified and sanitized to reduce direct identification risk.
LegalPrivacy.controlBody: Plan and product settings define what can be shared publicly; some settings become locked after first publish.
LegalPrivacy.contactBody: For privacy-related requests, contact us through platform channels and we will process requests through standard procedures.
LegalPrivacy.summaryNote: Note: this is a plain-language summary. Formal legal documents may provide additional details.

ApiDocs.title: Dataset API Docs
ApiDocs.subtitle: Explore dataset APIs in Swagger UI with complete parameters, examples, and error codes, plus interactive try-out.
ApiDocs.howToAuth: Try-it reuses your current signed-in session cookie. Sign in first before testing.
ApiDocs.howToTryIt: Switch servers from Swagger UI. Use /api same-origin proxy for interactive testing.
ApiDocs.howToDownloadLimit: For paid versions, call POST /datasets/{id}/purchase first, then download with POST /datasets/{id}/download. Docs Try-it keeps paid download blocked for safety.
ApiDocs.troubleshootingAuth: 401 unauthorized: sign in again and confirm your session is still valid.
ApiDocs.troubleshootingOrigin: Origin verification failed: call from this site page, not direct cross-site requests.
ApiDocs.troubleshootingRateLimit: 429 rate limit: retry later and avoid burst traffic.
ApiDocs.tryItBlockedInvalidDownload: Download request format is invalid. Request blocked.
ApiDocs.tryItBlockedPaid: This dataset is paid. Docs Try-it download is blocked.
ApiDocs.tryItBlockedLookupFailed: Unable to confirm dataset access type. Download blocked by safe default.
